text: Stock Market Today: Major Indexes Set Fresh All-Time Highs as Dell Leads Tech Gains; S&P 500 on Pace for 9th Straight Weekly Rise; Oil Prices Pull Back - Investopedia
fullText: The three major U.S. equities indexes set new intraday records Friday as Dell Technologies led the latest tech-stock advance and oil prices pulled back on optimism of a U.S.-Iran peace deal.

text: 5 dead, 34 injured after bus strikes several vehicles on I-95 in Stafford County - WJLA
fullText: Five people are dead and dozens are injured after a multi-vehicle crash early Friday morning on Interstate 95 southbound in Stafford County.

text: Pam Bondi tells lawmakers ‘redaction errors’ were made in Epstein files release - NBC News
fullText: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi told lawmakers on the House Oversight Committee on Friday that the Justice Department made “redaction errors” in its release of records related to Jeffrey Epstein, according to a copy of her opening statement obtained by NBC …

text: Musical artists bail from Freedom 250 fair over ‘political involvement’ - Politico
fullText: Many of the acts that were announced as performers earlier this week have since pulled out.

text: Louisiana Republicans pass gerrymandered map that eliminates majority-Black district - Politico
fullText: The new map has five of the state’s six House districts as GOP-leaning.

text: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation - TechCrunch
fullText: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.

text: ‘60 Minutes’ Future Won’t Look Like Its Past. New Chief Nick Bilton May Try “Gonzo Journalism” - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: Its incoming exec producer reveals early plans (including beat correspondents) as the overhaul hits insiders “like a ton of bricks" after being telegraphed by CBS News editor in chief Bari Weiss.

text: Live Updates: Trump says he will decide today on Iran deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz, destroy uranium - CBS News
fullText: Trump said Friday that Iran must agree to never have a nuclear weapon and to reopen the Strait or Hormuz immediately, without tolls.

text: Microsoft teases new Surface hardware and ‘a new era of PC’ - The Verge
fullText: The teasers point to Computex and Build announcements next week.

text: Dell Stock Soars 30% as Earnings Blow Past Wall Street Expectations - Investopedia
fullText: Dell shares skyrocketed Friday, adding to their recent record highs, after the server maker posted better-than-expected results and lifted its outlook on booming AI demand.

text: Severed sea cucumber appendages don't seem to die - Ars Technica
fullText: They seem to reorganize their tissues and then just keep living.

text: Judge temporarily blocks payouts from Trump's $1.776 billion 'anti-weaponization' settlement fund - AP News
fullText: A federal judge has temporarily blocked President Donald Trump's administration from paying any claims through a new $1.776 billion settlement fund for the Republican president's allies who believe they were victims of a weaponized government. U.S. District J…

text: Box Office: ‘Backrooms’ Makes $10.4 Million in Previews, Shattering A24 Record - Variety
fullText: 'Backrooms' has made $10.4 million at the box office Thursday previews, a record for A24

text: To travel far on cloudy days, pigeons listen to their gut - CNN
fullText: Iron-rich cells in the birds’ liver could help explain how pigeons and other animals navigate with help from Earth’s magnetic field.

text: A court in Kenya blocks U.S. plan to keep American Ebola patients in Africa - The Washington Post
fullText: A facility built by the U.S. military on a Kenyan air base was intended to isolate Americans exposed to Ebola during the growing outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

text: Laos miner emerges from cave where group has been trapped for over a week, rescue organization says - CBS News
fullText: The lead rescue diver told "CBS Mornings" earlier Friday that teaching the trapped miners how to scuba dive might be the only way to free them.

text: New Calif. governor's race poll shows Becerra growing lead with days to go - SFGATE
fullText: California voters are just days away from the primary election for the next governor.

text: ‘Obsession’ Has Dethroned ‘The Mandalorian And Grogu’ At The Box Office - Forbes
fullText: Obsession, the $1 million horror movie, is now beating The Mandalorian and Grogu, the $165 million Star wars movie.
